description.value:
Trigger A living creature ends their turn inside the watch post

Effect Ghostly human soldiers manifest in the central alcove, crying out in terror as they drop their weapons and beg for mercy. Each PC in area A3 becomes overwhelmed with the conviction that their own battle prowess will not save them from the danger rushing toward the building and must attempt a @Check[will|dc:22] save to avoid becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 3} on a critical failure). The haunt then rolls initiative.

A creature that takes damage from a shadowy tail is uncomfortably tickled by the slithering appendage and must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:21] save to avoid becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

details.description: The ghosts of weeping, cowardly soldiers and the sound of claws scraping on the outer walls manifest.
details.disable: @Check[intimidation|dc:26] (trained) to stand firm against the coming terrors and show no fear or @Check[religion|dc:23] (expert) to exorcise the haunt; two total successes are required to disable the haunt

publication.title: Pathfinder Adventure Path: Bastion of Blasphemies

details.reset: The haunt deactivates and then resets after 1 round in which no living creatures are within the watch post.
details.routine: (1 action) The sound of talons scratching on the outer walls of the room and glimpses of lean, shadowy shapes apping and scrambling at the arrow slits manifest. A PC who takes an action to [[/act seek]] these shapes and succeeds at a @Check[occultism|dc:21] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Recall Knowledge] recognizes the shapes as nightgaunts. Each round on its turn, these shadowy nightgaunts reach impossibly long, thin, spade-tipped tails into the room through the arrow slits or down the stove's chimney to make a shadowy tail Strike against every creature in the room as 1 action. If the door to this area remains open, the tails have an easier time reaching inside and gain a +2 circumstance bonus on their attack rolls.
